content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit framework imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:4-5, but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or features anywhere in the view or metadata.
Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to genuinely support home-automation scenarios; an unrelated wallpaper app instantiating HMHomeManager will likely trigger review questions or rejection under 4.5.1/4.5.3, and it also needlessly requires the HomeKit entitlement/usage-description which may confuse users during permission prompts. Since HMHomeManager isn't actually used for anything (no home/room/accessory UI), remove the HomeKit import and entitlement entirely unless a real home feature is planned.
